scripts.vercel:build: pnpm install && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@multisystem/database && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='packages/database/dist/generated/prisma/client.js'; if (!fs.existsSync(p)) { console.error('Build verification failed: missing '+p); process.exit(1); }" && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@multisystem/api && mkdir -p packages/api/node_modules/@multisystem && rm -rf packages/api/node_modules/@multisystem/database && cp -r packages/database packages/api/node_modules/@multisystem/database && rm -rf packages/api/node_modules/@multisystem/database/node_modules
